author: audit-agent

patch.value: Error output only says 'No update-many mutation flags provided' without listing what mutation flags are available. For agent UX, the error should enumerate available flags: --status, --priority, --tags, --description, etc.
Update-many: improve error message when no mutation flags provided

pm update-many with --dry-run but no actual mutation flags (--status, --priority, etc.) fails with 'No update-many mutation flags provided'. This is correct validation but the error should list available mutation flags to guide agents.
Error message includes available mutation flag list

message: Audit finding: update-many error message lacks guidance
